description: A vertical graphic with a desaturated photograph of a person wearing glasses and a telephone headset at a workstation, overlaid with faint binary digits. A Department of Homeland Security seal and the words U.S. Immigration and Customs Enforcement appear at the top left. White and blue text reads Sharing timely & relevant information with law enforcement partners around the world. Large text near the bottom reads LAW ENFORCEMENT SUPPORT CENTER, with ICE.gov/LESC beside it.
notable_text: U.S. Immigration and Customs Enforcement; Sharing timely & relevant information with law enforcement partners around the world.; LAW ENFORCEMENT SUPPORT CENTER; ICE.gov/LESC
